name: Ruby Red Rasberry Cheese Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen raspberries and drained the crushed pineapple, saving their juices.
2. Drain the prepared Dream Whip and save its juice.
3. Combine the saved juices with 1/4 cup cold water to make a total of 1 3/4 cups liquid.
4. Heat the mixture to boiling and add the raspberry Jello. Stir until the Jello is dissolved.
5. Allow the mixture to cool until it is partially set.
6. Add the thawed raspberries to the cooled gelatin mixture and pour into an oiled mold.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. In a separate bowl, soften the unflavored gelatin in cold water, then dissolve it over hot water.
9. Allow the gelatin solution to cool to room temperature.
10. Cream together the cream cheese, Dream Whip, and powdered sugar until smooth.
11. Blend the cooled gelatin into the pineapple juice mixture.
12. Fold the blended pineapple mixture and nuts into the cream cheese blend.
13. Spoon the combined mixture over the raspberry layer in the mold.
14. Refrigerate until firm.
15. Remove from the mold and serve.
